changeSet.author: memoon
changeSet.comment: Remove Short-FSRS learning state; FSRS v6 only. Cards that were pure short-learning (S/D both ~0) become new cards; lapse re-entries keep FSRS stability.
changeSet.sql: UPDATE cards SET short_stability_minutes = NULL, learning_review_count = NULL, critical_before = NULL, high_risk_before = NULL, stability = CASE WHEN COALESCE(stability, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(difficulty, 0) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE stability END, difficulty = CASE WHEN COALESCE(stability, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(difficulty, 0) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE difficulty END, last_review = CASE WHEN COALESCE(stability, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(difficulty, 0) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE last_review END, next_review = CASE WHEN COALESCE(stability, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(difficulty, 0) = 0 THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE next_review END WHERE short_stability_minutes IS NOT NULL OR learning_review_count IS NOT NULL;
